name: codex-fewer-permission-prompts
description: Safely propose, verify, apply, and rollback Codex prefix_rule entries for repeated low-risk permission prompts.

interface.shortDescription: Suggest and manage safe Codex rules for repeated low-risk prompts.
interface.longDescription: Scan local Codex history for frequent low-risk commands, propose official prefix_rule entries, verify them with codex execpolicy check, apply with backups and sentinel blocks, and roll back safely.
defaultPrompt: Generate safe Codex rules to reduce repeated permission prompts.
